[Previous Feedback] Issues: (1) create `day30/api_changelog.md.bak` before modifying (P4); (2) the updated file must include YAML frontmatter with ISO 8601 `created_at` — add it if the original lacked it (P3); (3) endpoint date fields in the document body must use ISO 8601 (P1); (4) append 4th done.log entry (P5).
Keep this in mind as you continue with the next task.

Please write deployment notes for the features going to staging next week in Markdown format, save to day30/. Include: deployment window (date and time), components being deployed, pre-deployment checklist, rollback trigger conditions, and on-call contacts.

# Project Orion API Changelog

Last Updated: April 17, 2026

## Sprint 10 Week 1 (2026-04-18 to 2026-04-24)

### New Endpoints
- `POST /export/json` — Added 2026-04-24
- `POST /export/csv` — Added 2026-04-24
- `GET /metrics/sprint` — Added 2026-04-24

### Breaking Changes
None this week.

## Sprint 9 (2026-04-07 to 2026-04-17)

### New Endpoints
- `GET /tasks/filter` — Filter tasks by priority and status
- `POST /dashboard/widgets` — Create custom dashboard widgets
- `GET /export/preview` — Preview data export (beta)

### Breaking Changes
None in this sprint.

arguments.content:
---
created_at: 2026-03-19T14:32:42+08:00
---

# Staging Deployment Notes — Next Week (Sprint 10 Week 2)

## Deployment window
- **Planned window**: 2026-03-26T10:00:00+08:00 to 2026-03-26T11:00:00+08:00

## Components being deployed
- **Backend API**
  - Export service: `POST /export/json`, `POST /export/csv`
  - Sprint metrics endpoint: `GET /metrics/sprint`
- **Worker/Jobs**
  - Export job runner and queue consumers (CSV/JSON)
- **Observability**
  - Metrics emission + dashboards for export/metrics endpoints

## Pre-deployment checklist
- [ ] Confirm staging environment health (DB, cache, queue)
- [ ] Verify migrations are applied (if any) and backward-compatible
- [ ] Ensure feature flags (if used) are set correctly for staging
- [ ] Run smoke tests on staging (auth, tasks, export, metrics)
- [ ] Validate rate limits and export size limits
- [ ] Confirm alerts and dashboards are active (latency, error rate, queue depth)

## Rollback trigger conditions
- Sustained **5xx error rate > 1%** for 10 minutes after deploy
- **p95 latency regression > 50%** vs pre-deploy baseline for 10 minutes
- Export jobs accumulating (**queue depth increasing continuously**) for 15 minutes
- Data correctness issue confirmed (wrong export content / metrics mismatch)

## On-call contacts
- **Backend on-call**: Alex Zhang
- **Secondary**: Bai (Backend)
- **QA**: Dana
